renamed_reason: Align with committed faction names from pages/notes/pages-notes-splitroot-name-and-design-foundation-2026-05-23 (Verdant Choir / Kinwild Covenant / Lenswright Compact). Prior IDs (verdant_court / wildbond_clans / brassroot_artificers) predated the naming commit.

factions.role: terrain control, growing walls, root-vault mobility, healing groves, agile defenders
factions.lineage_hooks: Living arrows, thornsprout swarms, bramble walls

factions.role: pack pressure, bonded beasts, shapeshift bursts, scouting, shock assaults, bound-leap mobility
factions.lineage_hooks: Beast bites, hunt horns, scent-track scouts, shapeshift ambush

factions.direction: pre-gunpowder science: clockwork, optics, pressure, alchemy
factions.role: siege tools, deployable field works, pressure-thrust mobility, optical scouts, alchemical fire
factions.lineage_hooks: Pressure-bolt crossbows, clockwork limbs, alchemical flasks, ballistas, optic spyglass. EXPLICITLY no muzzle flashes, no powder smoke, no firearms.

legal_distinctness: These are original fantasy directions and should not copy protected units, names, art, lore, or UI from reference games.
